title: Dekton Black 20mm x 1m Hook & Loop Fastener – 100% Nylon with Self-Adhesive Backing for Secure and Versatile Use – Ideal for Crafts, Organization, and Home Projects – Easy to Apply and Durable
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Versatile Applications: The Dekton Black Hook & Loop Fastener is perfect for a wide range of projects, including crafts, home organization, and DIY tasks. Use it to secure items, create custom closures, or keep cables neatly arranged.

Self-Adhesive Backing: Featuring a strong self-adhesive backing, this fastener allows for easy and quick installation on various surfaces. Simply peel off the backing and stick it to clean, dry surfaces for a reliable hold.

Durable Construction: Made from 100% nylon, this hook and loop fastener is designed for durability and longevity. It withstands everyday use, ensuring your items stay securely fastened over time without fraying or losing effectiveness.

Easy to Cut: The 20mm width and 1m length provide ample material for your needs, and it can be easily cut to size for custom applications. Whether you need longer strips or smaller pieces, you can tailor it to fit your project perfectly.

Clean and Tidy Finish: This fastener provides a neat and professional look to your projects, eliminating the need for traditional fasteners. Enjoy a clean finish without visible screws or nails, enhancing the aesthetics of your work.
